generated_by: Claude - split from combined written_content_index.json into notes-only manifest. Companion file: written_content_index.json covers the WA (Written Question Answers) series.
scope: Oral/page-range-based notes series ONLY: Simon Sir Oral Notes, Current Topics, Engineering Management Notes. NOT the WA written question-answer series (see written_content_index.json). NOT the oral QB card-based series (see qb_content_index.json).
source_of_truth_policy: This JSON is the authoritative source. index.html cards are generated FROM this manifest, not edited independently. Any content change updates this file first.

simon-notes.source_attribution: Originally prepared by Vignesh Siva. Transcribed, expanded & updated to 2026 regulations by Nixon Antony, 2/E, Maersk A/S.

simon-notes-p1.html.summary: Maritime security (UKMTO/MSCHOA), IS Code intact stability criteria, CII/CF, STCW Manila amendments, hours of rest, lifeboat testing, cyber security, GISIS, MARPOL Annex VI, IMO DCS, GHG strategy, watchkeeping, LSA Code.

simon-notes-p2.html.summary: Gyro/compass, LRIT vs AIS, MMSI, stability booklet, GT/NT formulas, DWT, guardrails, CII AER, Arctic HFO ban, ballast water management, CLC 1992, commercial law, ISMS/ISO, EU ETS.

simon-notes-p3.html.summary: COP 28/29, CBDR-RC, IS Code righting-arm criteria, NOSDCP, broaching, lifeboat engine specs, lithium-ion battery fire, FSI/PSC qualifications, FMEA/RPN, ISM apex manual tiers, MSA 2025/DGMA, STCW 2027, ISO 8217:2024, FAME biofuel, flags of convenience.
simon-notes-p3.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix scheduled during batch gate-script pass (Section noted in miw-notes-production skill). Do not replace /SQ/ in paywall redirect when fixing.

simon-notes-p4.html.summary: SAR 1979, GNSS jamming/spoofing, full PSC chain (action codes, detention types, suspension, appeal), SOLAS training manual Pack A/B, lifejacket specification, lifeboat davit P.92, hull steel grades, CE ISM+MLC duties, blockchain, IoT, IWIS predictive maintenance.
simon-notes-p4.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending, same as p1/p2/p3/p5-p8.

simon-notes-p5.html.summary: Bonjean curves, GZ & dynamic stability, smart sensors & IOPP, VDR, ARPA, flag state duties (UNCLOS Art.94), ME vs MC engine types, Port of Refuge, Polar Code, LSA Code & FSS Code.
simon-notes-p5.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending, same as p1-p4/p6-p8.

simon-notes-p6.html.summary: Formal Safety Assessment (FSA) 5-step process, competency vs proficiency, class vs statutory certificates, COP-29 & MARPOL amendments, Maritime Zones Act 1976, BDN retention rules, load line survey, SAFCON, parametric rolling, inclining experiment & free surface effect.
simon-notes-p6.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending.

simon-notes-p7.html.summary: CO2 fixed firefighting system (pressure testing, capacity, maintenance), TQM 8 principles, FAL Convention & 7 FAL forms, Maritime Single Window, maritime liens, UNCLOS zones, CSC Convention, container marking ISO 6346, VGM & 2026 container regs.
simon-notes-p7.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending.

simon-notes-p8.html.summary: SUA Convention & 2005 Protocol, London Dumping Convention & 1996 Protocol, Basel Convention (toxic trade, Ban Amendment), HNS Convention 2010 Protocol, BWM Convention D-1/D-2, BWTS type approval (G8/BWMS Code), IMO vs USCG differences.
simon-notes-p8.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending.

current-topics.series_name: Current Topics — Live Regulatory & Class Tracking

current-topics-p1.html.summary: MASS Code, EU/UK ETS & FuelEU Maritime, GFI/Net-Zero Framework, hydrogen propulsion (LR BeHydro TA), IACS UR E26/E27 cyber security, AI watchkeeping, SOLAS lifting appliances & PFOS-free firefighting foam, BWM D-2, NCSR 13 nav/comms (digital VHF, R-mode, EPIRB, S-100 ECDIS, NAVDAT), Strait of Hormuz security.
current-topics-p1.html.regulatory_sensitivity: HIGH - explicitly time-dated regulatory tracking content; re-verify against latest MEPC/NCSR sessions before extending.

miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.title: IMO Structure & Conventions
miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.summary: IMO organisational structure, Committees & Sub-Committees, IMO instruments, convention lifecycle (adoption, ratification, tacit acceptance).
miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.gating_note: Applied full content-protection stack this session (gate script, noindex/nofollow/noarchive/nosnippet robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark). Original upload had robots='index, follow' and no gate — corrected. Footer text also corrected: original said 'This is a free public resource... Subscriber access unlocks Parts 3-31', implying Part 1/2 were meant as an ungated teaser. Now gated per Nixon's explicit instruction — flag if a free-teaser policy for Part 1 was actually intended, since that would need the opposite treatment.
